use_cases: Content section navigation in dashboard interfaces
Settings panel organization with animated tab switching
Categorized content display for SaaS products
Navigation between different views in web applications
ai_summary: An animated tabs component with a dynamically positioned sliding indicator that follows the active tab. Uses IntersectionObserver and MutationObserver to track tab state changes, with requestAnimationFrame for smooth indicator transitions. Built on Radix UI primitives for accessibility, the component features a fluid animated underline effect that morphs between tabs on click.
